protocols.name: Sky

tmf_waterfall.abc_level_note: ABC is a managed Keel ALM portfolio (sUSDS / RWAs / Spark-Grove) — current level is not cleanly readable from a single on-chain balance.
tmf_waterfall.source: Sky governance TMF executive (Apr/May 2026); percentages are governance framework params, editable here.

phase.notes: Phase 1 of TMF framework. SBE bypassed during ABC fill (~15 months base case from Apr 2026). 40% of net revenue → ABC, 40% → SKY stakers (as USDS), 20% → Security/Maintenance.

protocols.unlocks_24mo_notes: 98.9% circulating; no remaining schedule
protocols.emissions_24mo_notes: Staking yield paid in USDS, not new SKY
protocols.buybacks_24mo_notes: SBE bypassed during Phase 1; verified on-chain — MCD_FLAP + MCD_SPLIT have zero activity 90d
protocols.annual_holder_yield_notes: Article: 40% × $180.73M net revenue paid in USDS to stkSKY (Cat B). On-chain (REWARDS_LSSKY_USDS = 0x38E4254b...) confirms USDS distribution mechanism — but inflows stopped 2025-11-03, 200+ days dormant. Either restructured post-Apr-2026 framework or paused.
